name: Feature request
about: Suggest a teaching, RTL, verification, wrapper, or documentation improvement
title: "[feature]: "

## Problem Or Learning Gap

What should this project help users understand or integrate better?


## Proposed Direction


## Scope

- [ ] Core equal-width FIFO
- [ ] Width-conversion wrapper
- [ ] Stream wrapper
- [ ] Formal verification
- [ ] Simulation or waveform tutorial
- [ ] CDC/sign-off documentation
- [ ] XPM/industrial-interface comparison
- [ ] Open-source maintenance

## Teaching Impact

How would this preserve or improve the path:

```text
intuition -> mechanism -> RTL -> verification/sign-off
```


## Compatibility And Non-Goals

Does this change public ports, parameters, reset behavior, capacity, or timing?


## Suggested Checks

Which tests, formal targets, or docs should be updated?
